'''zongabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:coactivatory|coactivatory]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coactivatory|coactivatory]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zongabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zongabithi|zongabithi]] || [[word:zongabiji|zongabiji]] || [[word:zongabishi|zongabishi]] || [[word:zongabiki|zongabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zongabuthuthu|zongabuthuthu]] || [[word:zongabujuju|zongabujuju]] || [[word:zongabushushu|zongabushushu]] || [[word:zongabukuku|zongabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zongabuthu|zongabuthu]] || [[word:zongabuju|zongabuju]] || [[word:zongabushu|zongabushu]] || [[word:zongabuku|zongabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zongabufthuf|zongabufthuf]] || [[word:zongabufjuf|zongabufjuf]] || [[word:zongabufshuf|zongabufshuf]] || [[word:zongabufkuf|zongabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zongabethe|zongabethe]] || [[word:zongabeje|zongabeje]] || [[word:zongabeshe|zongabeshe]] || [[word:zongabeke|zongabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zongabothotho|zongabothotho]] || [[word:zongabojojo|zongabojojo]] || [[word:zongaboshosho|zongaboshosho]] || [[word:zongabokoko|zongabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zongabotho|zongabotho]] || [[word:zongabojo|zongabojo]] || [[word:zongabosho|zongabosho]] || [[word:zongaboko|zongaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zongabofthof|zongabofthof]] || [[word:zongabofjof|zongabofjof]] || [[word:zongabofshof|zongabofshof]] || [[word:zongabofkof|zongabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zongabïfthïf|zongabïfthïf]] || [[word:zongabïfjïf|zongabïfjïf]] || [[word:zongabïfshïf|zongabïfshïf]] || [[word:zongabïfkïf|zongabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zongabïfthïfthïf|zongabïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zongabïfjïfjïf|zongabïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zongabïfshïfshïf|zongabïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zongabïfkïfkïf|zongabïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zongabïfthïf|zongabïfthïf]] || [[word:zongabïfjïf|zongabïfjïf]] || [[word:zongabïfshïf|zongabïfshïf]] || [[word:zongabïfkïf|zongabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zongabïfthïf|zongabïfthïf]] || [[word:zongabïfjïf|zongabïfjïf]] || [[word:zongabïfshïf|zongabïfshïf]] || [[word:zongabïfkïf|zongabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zongabæthæ|zongabæthæ]] || [[word:zongabæjæ|zongabæjæ]] || [[word:zongabæshæ|zongabæshæ]] || [[word:zongabækæ|zongabækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zongabathatha|zongabathatha]] || [[word:zongabajaja|zongabajaja]] || [[word:zongabashasha|zongabashasha]] || [[word:zongabakaka|zongabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zongabatha|zongabatha]] || [[word:zongabaja|zongabaja]] || [[word:zongabasha|zongabasha]] || [[word:zongabaka|zongabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zongabafthaf|zongabafthaf]] || [[word:zongabafjaf|zongabafjaf]] || [[word:zongabafshaf|zongabafshaf]] || [[word:zongabafkaf|zongabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zongabasha|zongabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zongabshësha|zongabshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zongabrosha|zongabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zongabmusha|zongabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zongabyasha|zongabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozongabnkshësha|gozongabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozongabnkrosha|gozongabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozongabnkmusha|gozongabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozongabnkyasha|gozongabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zongangabasha|zongangabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zongangabshësha|zongangabshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zongangabrosha|zongangabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zongangabmusha|zongangabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zongangabyasha|zongangabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozongangabnkshësha|gozongangabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozongangabnkrosha|gozongangabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozongangabnkmusha|gozongangabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozongangabnkyasha|gozongangabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zengæbasha|zengæbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zengæbshësha|zengæbshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zengæbrosha|zengæbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zengæbmusha|zengæbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zengæbyasha|zengæbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozengæbnkshësha|gozengæbnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozengæbnkrosha|gozengæbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozengæbnkmusha|gozengæbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozengæbnkyasha|gozengæbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zongfabasha|zongfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zongfabshësha|zongfabshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zongfabrosha|zongfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zongfabmusha|zongfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zongfabyasha|zongfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozongfabnkshësha|gozongfabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozongfabnkrosha|gozongfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozongfabnkmusha|gozongfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozongfabnkyasha|gozongfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
